sections_cited: Section 21 of the Sales Tax Act

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. NO. D-1452 / 2025 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ PRIORITY. 1) For hearing of Misc. No. 7282/2025. 2) For hearing of main case. 30.04.2025. Mr. Mushtaq Hussain Qazi, Advocate for Petitioner. Ms. Mehreen Ibrahim, Assistant Attorney General. Dr. Shah Nawaz Memon, Advocate for Respondent. ________________ Para wise comments have been filed by the Respondent’s Counsel which are taken on record. However, the Petitioner has already filed a representation under Section 21 of the Sales Tax Act, 1990 against the order of suspension issued under Section 21 ibid. In view of the above, let the representation be decided by the concerned Chief Commissioner within 3 (three) days time from today after affording of opportunity of hearing to the Petitioner in accordance with law. If the Petitioner is further agreed, appropriate remedy may be sought in accordance with law. With these observations, Petition stands disposed of. Let copy of this order be issued to all concerned. ACTING CHIEF JUSTICE J U D G E Arshad/

Let copy of this order be issued to all concerned. ACTING CHIEF JUSTICE J U D G E Arshad/ ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. NO. D-1452 / 2025 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ FRESH CASE. 1) For orders on Misc. No. 7280/2025. 2) For orders on Misc. No. 7281/2025. 3) For orders on Misc. No. 7282/2025. 4) For hearing of main case. 14.04.2025. Mr. Mushtaq Hussain Qazi, Advocate for Petitioner. ________________ 1) Granted. 2) Granted subject to all exceptions. 3 & 4) Notice to Respondents as well as DAG for 22.04.2025. ACTING CHIEF JUSTICE J U D G E Arshad/
